div.p: Key Insight: With ASID tagging, TLB entries from the old process remain in the TLB but are marked with ASID=1. When the new process (ASID=2) performs lookups, entries with ASID=1 won't match → treated as misses. Benefit: No TLB flush required → instant context switch! Without ASIDs: Full TLB flush would clear all entries → cold TLB → performance penalty.
